strengths: Strong SQL and complex query optimization
Hands-on ETL and pipeline development with Python
BI/dashboard building (Power BI, Tableau) with measurable impact
Experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL) and joins/CTEs
weaknesses: Limited explicit data warehouse platform usage (Snowflake/BigQuery)
No listed experience with orchestration tools (Airflow/Dagster)
No demonstrated dimensional modeling or SCD implementation
No healthcare claims or EDI/X12 experience
Shorter total industry experience in analytics roles
improvement_bullets: Developed robust data models using star/snowflake schema dimensional modeling techniques, transitioning raw lending data into a structured data warehouse environment for scalable risk analysis.
Engineered and automated end-to-end ELT/ETL pipelines utilizing Python and SQL, incorporating data governance best practices to ensure high data freshness and accuracy.
Optimized data infrastructure by implementing repeatable workflows, utilizing scheduling tools to orchestrate data movement and reduce latency in reporting.
Established comprehensive reporting SOPs and data documentation protocols to standardize self-serve analytics, ensuring consistent and reliable data delivery to stakeholders.
Leveraged advanced database architecture concepts, including slowly changing dimensions and optimized join strategies, to support complex analytics across large-scale datasets.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Analytics Engineer opportunity with Alaffia Health. I am interested in this opportunity because of Alaffia’s mission to reduce administrative waste and improve healthcare affordability through transparent AI. What interests me about working for Alaffia is its commitment to solving the systemic inefficiencies in U.S. healthcare, which resonates with my own background in building data systems that drive operational clarity. I believe my expertise in complex SQL and ETL pipeline development, and my commitment to data governance, would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on translating raw, unstructured data into actionable business intelligence. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a need for better data visibility and engineered a transition from manual reporting to an automated Power BI environment, which reduced processing time by 40% and directly supported a 300% increase in customer acquisition. Ultimately, I know that the Analytics Engineer role at Alaffia would allow me to bring my dimensional modeling expertise to build the foundational data layers necessary for high-growth decision-making. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my SOP documentation and data quality skills. I established new documentation standards for operational workflows, which reduced new-hire onboarding time by 50% and ensured consistent data-driven service delivery across the organization. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python-driven data engineering in working on the analytics engine at Alaffia. I know that my technical rigor in SQL/ETL design and my collaborative mindset align with what it takes to succeed at the Analytics Engineer role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
